getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.hero: Your participation can transform Nepal. Join thousands of committed individuals working towards a progressive, corruption-free nation.
getInvolved.waysDesc: Choose how you want to contribute to building a better Nepal
getInvolved.volunteerDesc: Join our dedicated team of volunteers and be the change you want to see in Nepal.
getInvolved.flexibleCommitmentDesc: Choose activities that fit your schedule
getInvolved.skillDevelopmentDesc: Gain valuable experience in community organizing
getInvolved.makeRealImpactDesc: See the direct results of your contributions
getInvolved.trainingProvidedDesc: We'll equip you with everything you need
getInvolved.joinRSP: Join Pashupatinath Norway Temple today and be part of Nepal's transformation story
getInvolved.communityOrganizerDesc: Lead local initiatives and bring Nepalis together in your city
getInvolved.digitalActivistDesc: Amplify our message through social media and online campaigns
getInvolved.policyContributorDesc: Help shape Pashupatinath Norway Temple's policies and strategic direction
getInvolved.fundraisingTeamDesc: Support our mission through creative fundraising initiatives
getInvolved.youthAmbassadorDesc: Engage young Nepalis and drive youth participation
getInvolved.creativeTeamDesc: Design visual content and creative materials
getInvolved.representValues: Represent Pashupatinath Norway Temple values locally
getInvolved.testimonial1: Being part of Pashupatinath Norway Temple has given me a platform to contribute meaningfully to Nepal's future while staying connected to my roots.
getInvolved.testimonial2: The energy and commitment of Pashupatinath Norway Temple members inspire me every day. Together, we're creating real change for Nepal.
getInvolved.testimonial3: Pashupatinath Norway Temple gives me the opportunity to use my skills for something bigger than myself. It's about building the Nepal we all dream of.
getInvolved.testimonial4: The energy and commitment of Pashupatinath Norway Temple members inspires me every day. Together, we are bringing real change for Nepal.
getInvolved.thankYou: Thank you for your interest! We will contact you soon.

footer.about_description: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is dedicated to creating a sacred space for worship, spirituality, and cultural preservation for the Hindu community in Norway. Our goal is to build the first Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, where devotees can gather for prayers, rituals, and festivals that honor our rich traditions.
footer.tagline: Together, we build our sacred home

slider.subtitle_1: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a non-profit organization established in 2025 to bring together Nepalese people living in Norway. We are a community built on the values of brotherhood, mutual support, and cultural pride.
slider.subtitle_2: The diaspora is key to Nepal's transformation. Connect with fellow Nepalis in Norway, participate in our initiatives, and help shape policies that matter. Together we build the Nepal we dream of.

about-us.title: Our Vision
about-us.subtitle: Building Pashupatinath Norway Temple
about-us.about_description_1: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is dedicated to creating a sacred space for worship, spirituality, and cultural preservation for the Hindu community in Norway. Our goal is to build the first Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, where devotees can gather for prayers, rituals, and festivals that honor our rich traditions.
about-us.about_description_2: With the support of our community, we are working towards making this vision a reality. Join us in this journey—together, we can establish a spiritual place for generations to come.
about-us.mission_description: Our mission is to unite and empower the Nepalese community in Norway.
about-us.vision_description: A thriving, connected Nepalese community in Norway where every member feels supported, valued, and proud of their heritage - while contributing as active, integrated members of Norwegian society.

about.title: Welcome to Pashupatinath Norway Temple
about.description: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is dedicated to empowering the Nepali community residing in Norway socially, culturally, and educationally. We are committed to providing our members with support, guidance, and opportunities to help them reach their full potential.
about.mission_description: Building a strong, united community that celebrates democratic values and supports every Nepali's journey in Norway.
about.value_cultural_preservation_desc: Preserving our heritage by celebrating Nepalese festivals and promoting our language, culture, religion, traditions, norms, and values for current and future generations.
about.value_community_brotherhood_desc: Building a supportive network where community members help each other through life’s challenges and celebrate successes together.
about.value_social_integration_desc: Encouraging meaningful participation in Norwegian society while maintaining strong connections to our Nepalese identity.
about.value_humanitarian_support_desc: Providing financial assistance and community aid during emergencies, natural disasters, and times of need, both in Norway and in Nepal.
about.value_knowledge_exchange_desc: Sharing knowledge, experiences, and positive aspects of Norwegian society with our community and with people in Nepal for mutual growth and understanding.
about.cta_member_desc: Join our community and make your voice heard.
about.cta_donate_desc: Your contribution helps us create lasting impact.
about.cta_involved_desc: Volunteer and be part of the change you want to see.

rituals.title: Sacred Rituals & Services
rituals.subtitle: At Pashupatinath Norway Temple, we will offer a range of Hindu rituals and spiritual services to support our community's religious and cultural needs. Our dedicated priests will perform sacred ceremonies.
rituals.intro_description: We invite devotees to participate in these sacred traditions and seek divine blessings. Stay connected for updates on temple services and special ceremonies.
rituals.daily_puja_description: Worship and prayers for peace and prosperity.
rituals.rudrabhishek_description: Special offering to Lord Shiva for blessings and protection.
rituals.satyanarayan_description: A ritual for well-being, success, and family harmony.
rituals.hawan_description: Fire rituals for purification and divine blessings.
rituals.festivals_description: Grand observances of major Hindu festivals.
rituals.cta_description: Join us in these divine ceremonies and experience the blessings of ancient traditions. Contact us to schedule your special rituals.

festivals.title: Festivals & Events
festivals.subtitle: At Pashupatinath Norway Temple, we are committed to celebrating the rich cultural and spiritual traditions of Hinduism through vibrant festivals and community events. Our temple will host a variety of joyous celebrations that bring our community together.
festivals.intro_description: Join us in these festive occasions to experience the essence of Hindu traditions, share blessings, and build lasting memories with our community.
festivals.maha_shivaratri_description: A grand celebration of Lord Shiva with night-long prayers and rituals. Annual General Meeting will be arranged on this occasion.
festivals.teej_description: Celebrations of devotion, family, and the triumph of good over evil.
festivals.dashain_tihar_description: The Festival of Lights, celebrating victory and new beginnings.
festivals.holi_description: The colorful festival of love, unity, and joy.
festivals.special_programs_description: Spiritual discourses and performances that enrich our understanding of Hindu culture.
festivals.cta_description: Experience the joy and spirituality of Hindu festivals. Connect with our community and create beautiful memories together.

management.title: About Us
management.subtitle: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a religious organization dedicated to serving the Nepali Hindu community in Norway.
management.about_us_description: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a religious organization dedicated to serving the Nepali Hindu community in Norway. The organization was founded with the vision of building a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, providing a sacred space for worship, spiritual gatherings, and religious ceremonies.
management.vision_description: To build a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway that serves as a spiritual home for our community, preserving our cultural heritage and religious traditions for future generations.
management.board_description: We are pleased to introduce the updated list of current board members of Pashupatinath Norway Temple. Their dedication, experience, and commitment to our community will help guide our organization towards fulfilling its mission of establishing a sacred Hindu temple in Norway and preserving our cultural heritage.
management.temple_construction_desc: Establishing a dedicated Hindu temple for Nepali devotees in Norway.
management.religious_services_desc: Offering pujas, aartis, and Hindu religious ceremonies for the community.
management.cultural_spiritual_events_desc: Organizing traditional Hindu festivals such as Maha Shivaratri, Teej, Dashain, and Tihar to preserve cultural heritage.
management.community_support_desc: Providing guidance on Hindu traditions, spiritual well-being, and religious education.

donate.hero_description: Your generous contribution helps us make a positive impact in the Nepali community in Norway and support democratic values in Nepal.
donate.no_donors_yet: No donors yet. Be the first to contribute!
donate.community_events_desc: Support cultural programs and community gatherings
donate.organizational_growth_desc: Expand our reach and strengthen our movement
donate.member_support_desc: Resources and assistance for our members
donate.why_donate_1: 100% of donations go directly to our programs
donate.faq_1_answer: Yes, all payments are processed securely through Stripe, a trusted payment platform used by millions worldwide.
donate.faq_2_answer: Yes, you will receive an email receipt immediately after your donation is processed.
donate.faq_3_answer: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous by checking the anonymous option in the form.
donate.faq_4_question: How will my donation be used?
donate.faq_4_answer: Your donation supports community events, political advocacy, organizational operations, and member services.

donate.support_specific_cause: Your donation will support this specific cause
donate.donation_success_message: Your donation of {amount} NOK has been processed successfully.
